name: Pizza-Pan Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Lightly grease two 12-inch pizza pans.
3. Cream together butter, sugars, cream cheese, and vanilla in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs; beat until well combined.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and blend well.
7. Stir in chocolate chips and chopped walnuts or pecans.
8. Divide the dough into two equal parts and press each half evenly onto prepared pans.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges.
10. Cool completely on wire racks before serving.
11. To serve, cut into slim wedges or break into pieces.
